title: rutidea smithii subsp. submontana
intro: Rutidea smithii subsp. submontana, also known as the Submontane Rutidea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rutidea smithii subsp. submontana include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared into various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
